title: Hell at Heathridge
overview: Obsessed with obscure modern tragedies, wealthy Mr. Yates hires five college drama students to recreate a murder-suicide that occurred on their campus 20 years ago. As the actors prepare for the show of their lives, unfortunate events follow them and by the end they realize one thing . . . Evil is Real!
